specific_question: Do sales representatives receive commission payments at Elexion Automotive?
answer: Yes. In September 2024, Amanda Lee set up a CRM-based commission tracking system that calculates commission payouts for sales representatives based on conversion and lead contact rates.
dr_question: By the end of 2025, how can Elexion Automotive use data generated through its customer relationship management system to analyze customer behavior online and identify patterns that drive sales?
